paths.description: Paths to scan. Defaults to current directory.

rules.description: Rule severity overrides. Keys are selectors (rule id, wildcard, category:<name>, tag:<name>).

failOn.description: Exit threshold. Process exits non-zero when diagnostics meet this severity.

severity.description: Filter output to these severity levels.

concurrency.description: Maximum worker threads used to analyze tsconfig groups in parallel. Auto by default; set to 1 to disable.

cache.description: Enable on-disk diagnostic cache under node_modules/.cache/unguard. Default: true.
